display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Ash must choose.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Remi won’t give up on Sonny. Cash and Eden’s timelines are misaligned. Can Mali get through to a stubborn John?

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: The high-stakes quiz tasks teams with navigating a bridge of truths while avoiding lies to win cash prizes for charity.

programme.title: Good Chef, Bad Chef
programme.desc: Mike, Jacq, Tim and Jo create stunning dishes, balancing bold flavours and wholesome ingredients. Every meal is a delight-what will you try first?

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Our Travel Guides are ditching the rat race and hitting up the most chilled-out spot in the South Pacific - Vanuatu - for a tropical island adventure. S6 E4

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Milhouse takes the fall for a prank he and Bart pull together. S20 E17

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy try to eliminate stress from wedding planning by applying math to the process - ending up at city hall! Also, Raj "breaks up" with Howard! S11 E10

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Cash and Eden find a compromise. Mackenzie breaks down. Mali tricks John.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Poppy draws a line.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: Guided by MasterChef Alumni Justine Schofield, four contestants put their French techniques to the test for a chance to win a coveted immunity pin.

programme.title: Jimmy Carr's Am I The A**Hole?
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr, GK Barry & Jamali Maddix meet a woman who lied about her age to a partner & a mum who takes extreme measures over her daughter's mess. S1 E5

programme.title: Taskmaster Australia
programme.desc: Many items are carried at speed, Then, who will forfeit the task and leave Tom trapped in a box? And things get tense in the pikelet tossing live task. S5 E6

programme.title: St. Denis Medical
programme.desc: Alex hosts a Senior Health Fair. Bruce resuscitates a patient with a DNR. Ron competes with Matt over a patient’s homemade fudge. S2 E11

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: David Baddiel steers some heavy machinery towards a representation of his childhood sweetheart in the hopes of impressing Taskmaster Greg Davies. Starring New Zealand's very own Rose Matafeo! S9 E3

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Willows works with the FBI when a professional hit occurs at a law firm that she recommended to her friend. S12 E11

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A couple's desperation for money & violent sex fantasy lead to a woman's murder. S9 E5

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: Season Finale: Patty goes to extremes to win her case against UNR, as Ellen's season long quest for revenge builds to an explosive conclusion. S2 E13

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Season Premiere: The employees rush to finish rebuilding the store in time for its grand reopening. S3 E1

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Toi Time is back for Season 4 with more laughter and learning. Join Aunty Anika, Māia, Jojo, Riki, and Buzz as they explore the world around them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join these beloved blue characters as they go on all new adventures that will push the charm, absurdity, and humour of the original series to even greater heights!

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The Mystery Inc. gage solve mysteries alongside a new celebrity guest star each episode.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The superheroes Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy love saving the world. But after they decide to stop fighting crime, things do not go as planned.

programme.title: Darwin & Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother/sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: Guided by MasterChef Alumni Justine Schofield, four contestants put their French techniques to the test for a chance to win a coveted immunity pin.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Poppy draws a line.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: For the first time in 50 years, the Airfix team attempt a 1:24 scale kit of a Spitfire. Will designer Chris be able to capture the iconic warbird in sufficient detail.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: Simon and Montana attempt the hard sell at The Dorset Steam Fair, whilst designer Steve takes on the challenge of replicating one of the world's newest trains.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: In this special episode, company staff, enthusiasts and celebrities pick the top ten products and innovations that have most impressed and inspired them across the years.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: The iconic Locomotive Flying Scotsman is scaled down 120 times from real life, rendering some features almost invisible to the naked eye, or too small to even mould.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: Designer Phil takes on his toughest challenge yet - an entire reinvention of the Black Fives, encompassing all 842 variations.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: For the first time in 50 years, the Airfix team attempt a 1:24 scale kit of a Spitfire. Will designer Chris be able to capture the iconic warbird in sufficient detail.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: Simon and Montana attempt the hard sell at The Dorset Steam Fair, whilst designer Steve takes on the challenge of replicating one of the world's newest trains.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo visits places of interest in West Sussex and Hampshire, including Southsea's King's Theatre.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of Australia
programme.desc: Actor Martin Clunes explores Lord Howe Island, Norfolk Island and Restoration Island.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of Australia
programme.desc: Martin Clunes travels to the Tiwi Islands, swims with a whale shark, visits the Houtman Abrolhos, and samples life on Rottnest Island.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of Australia
programme.desc: The actor explores Mundoo Island, which has provided a way of life for five generations of one farming family, and also investigates Phillip Island.

programme.title: Man and Beast with Martin Clunes
programme.desc: Comedy actor Martin Clunes travels to Nepal, where he meets a farmer whose cows not only provide milk, but also the fuel for lighting and cooking in his home.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of Australia
programme.desc: Actor Martin Clunes explores Lord Howe Island, Norfolk Island and Restoration Island.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of Australia
programme.desc: Martin Clunes travels to the Tiwi Islands, swims with a whale shark, visits the Houtman Abrolhos, and samples life on Rottnest Island.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of Australia
programme.desc: The actor explores Mundoo Island, which has provided a way of life for five generations of one farming family, and also investigates Phillip Island.

programme.title: Man and Beast with Martin Clunes
programme.desc: Comedy actor Martin Clunes travels to Nepal, where he meets a farmer whose cows not only provide milk, but also the fuel for lighting and cooking in his home.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads out to pick up a pair of beautiful Swedish models - a Saab 96L and a Volvo P1800ES. Plus, a rare British AC Aceca comes up for sale.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A 1967 Aston Martin DB6 lands at the Mathewsons' - Derek believes it could break the record for the most expensive car ever sold at the auction.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A collection of Austin Mini Metros arrive for auction. Also under the hammer is a baby Fiat 850 coupe and a haulier offloads part of his vintage vehicle collection.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: There's an unlikely arrival at the North Yorkshire car auction - an Argentinian Army Mercedes G wagon that saw action in the Falklands War.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek has three scooters to collect, while also finding room for a Daimler and a teardrop caravan.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads out to pick up a pair of beautiful Swedish models - a Saab 96L and a Volvo P1800ES. Plus, a rare British AC Aceca comes up for sale.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A 1967 Aston Martin DB6 lands at the Mathewsons' - Derek believes it could break the record for the most expensive car ever sold at the auction.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A collection of Austin Mini Metros arrive for auction. Also under the hammer is a baby Fiat 850 coupe and a haulier offloads part of his vintage vehicle collection.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric in the Cotswolds of the 1950s. Brown witnesses the apparent suicide of a troubled student at Upcott Seminary.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A desert island survival course goes wrong when the leader - a trained survival expert and ex-SAS soldier - is found dead on a remote island near Saint Marie.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When the maid-of-honour winds up dead after a bachelorette party, Charlie and Rex must untangle the events of the night.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the cult mystery set in Victorian Toronto. A telephone operator hears what seems to be a woman being strangled on the line.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the cult mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch's English ex-lover, Anna, played by Lisa Faulkner, visits town.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson is Canada's answer to Sherlock Holmes in the mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. Is a demon behind the murder of a priest at a convent.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Cult mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch hunts for a vampire who may be inspired by the recent publication of 'Dracula' by Bram Stoker.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric in the Cotswolds of the 1950s. When the father of a young writer is found dead, tension mounts against Travellers.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: A wealthy man who had cancer is found murdered, despite only having weeks left to live, and the investigation reveals his son and wife to be the main suspects.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Rex finds a body during Charlie and Sarah's romantic weekend away, they discover the idyllic community they're staying in may be more hostile than it looks.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie and Al investigate the murder of an employee at a high-end matchmaking service, but with every secret they uncover, a new suspect emerges to confuse matters.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team is left stumped when the owner of a hair salon is killed in front of her family, but no one saw what happened.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson is Canada's answer to Sherlock Holmes in the mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. Is a demon behind the murder of a priest at a convent.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Cult mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch hunts for a vampire who may be inspired by the recent publication of 'Dracula' by Bram Stoker.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: A wealthy man who had cancer is found murdered, despite only having weeks left to live, and the investigation reveals his son and wife to be the main suspects.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Rex finds a body during Charlie and Sarah's romantic weekend away, they discover the idyllic community they're staying in may be more hostile than it looks.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric in the Cotswolds of the 1950s. When the father of a young writer is found dead, tension mounts against Travellers.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie and Al investigate the murder of an employee at a high-end matchmaking service, but with every secret they uncover, a new suspect emerges to confuse matters.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team is left stumped when the owner of a hair salon is killed in front of her family, but no one saw what happened.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: After a mysterious thief keeps stealing valuable treasures from under his nose, Hercule Flambeau asks Father Brown to help him eliminate the competition.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the sleuth on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. DI Goodman's aunt Mary comes to visit but witnesses the murder of a tourist. Wendy Craig guests.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric in the Cotswolds of the 1950s. When the father of a young writer is found dead, tension mounts against Travellers.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team is left stumped when the owner of a hair salon is killed in front of her family, but no one saw what happened.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A vivid Dutch DAF 66 - in daffodil yellow - lands at the North Yorkshire showroom.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole makes good money restoring an antique pine sideboard in Sheffield, but has less success with a pair of old brass jugs, while Simon converts a staircase into shelves.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Actress Charlie Hardwick shows Robson the hidden gems of the east Durham coastline while taking an art class on the sand and attending an outdoor singing session.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson is joined by author LJ Ross on a trip along the Northumbrian coast - they visit Holy Island, the setting for LJ's first novel, and sign up for a Nordic walking lesson.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An Albanian village home to Allied secret agents devastated for resisting the Nazi war machine, plus a notorious asylum in America that enforced lobotomies on a large scale.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: What happened to an infamous pirate city in Jamaica? Also, a grim gulag in Croatia and a Louisiana plantation caught up in the aftermath of the American Civil War.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave's in fast car heaven as he picks up a rare Subaru Impreza and an equally powerful Ford Escort RS Cosworth from North Wales.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A rare 1968 Honda N600 car emerges from a lock up in County Durham and Derek's in Scotland to collect an original RAC Bedford van.

programme.title: Battle Honours
programme.desc: The story of the longest-serving infantry division in the US Army, who fought in every major campaign in Western Europe in which American forces were engaged.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Deep in the forests of East Prussia, a sprawling Nazi complex becomes the nerve centre of Hitler's empire - and the site of a daring plot against the Fuhrer.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team returns to Hartland Abbey, Devon, where items of interest include a rare piece of pressed glass, and a quilt believed to be made from royal ballgowns.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team heads to St Andrews University, where items of interest include a bowl believed to have belonged to Bonnie Prince Charlie.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek meets the owner and builder of a sporty vintage Jaguar 'special', a Jaguar Viking.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek's back in his old stomping ground of Luton, to meet an old schoolmate who is saying goodbye to his 1912 De Dion Bouton.

programme.title: Battle Honours
programme.desc: The story of the longest-serving infantry division in the US Army, who fought in every major campaign in Western Europe in which American forces were engaged.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Deep in the forests of East Prussia, a sprawling Nazi complex becomes the nerve centre of Hitler's empire - and the site of a daring plot against the Fuhrer.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team returns to Hartland Abbey, Devon, where items of interest include a rare piece of pressed glass, and a quilt believed to be made from royal ballgowns.

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Wildlife that have adapted to survive in frozen mountain regions, from the high slopes of Mount Kenya on the equator to the remote Southern Alps of New Zealand.

programme.title: Explore with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve leads a team researching the hidden side of international tourist locations, beginning with the landscapes of Argentina.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek meets the owner and builder of a sporty vintage Jaguar 'special', a Jaguar Viking.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve witnesses the effect of extreme poverty on the people of Bangladesh, plays the country's national sport, and encounters the Burmese army.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek's back in his old stomping ground of Luton, to meet an old schoolmate who is saying goodbye to his 1912 De Dion Bouton.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave's in fast car heaven as he picks up a rare Subaru Impreza and an equally powerful Ford Escort RS Cosworth from North Wales.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Hampshire and Surrey, where Henry makes two coffee tables from a cable drum and a galvanised water tank, and Simon rescues a winged back chair.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Help! We Bought A Village
programme.desc: Intrepid Brits restore empty and unloved settlements heading steadily for collapse, as they breathe new life into remote villages, hamlets, borgos and cortijos abroad.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: Clarkson's Farm Continued
programme.desc: Season Finale: With Clarkson's farm restaurant due to open soon, the team rushes through last-minute preparations to avoid flak from the council. S2 E8

programme.title: James May's Shed Load Of Ideas
programme.desc: Series Premiere: James tackles incorrectly issued parking tickets. The team also try to improve the efficiency of chopping chips for James' pub. S1 E1

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Poppy draws a line.

programme.title: The Twelve
programme.desc: Colby names a rival writer as suspect in Amanda’s murder, pressure builds and the jury erupts. S3 E7

programme.title: Nothing Trivial
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Mac plays hero, as Brian plays the field. Emma has a new partner, and Michelle a mystery man. But is the answer to everything - Hamilton? S3 E1

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Answer Run
programme.desc: Comedian Jason Manford hosts an exciting, fast-paced quiz show, where three couples face a series of 50/50 questions which hurtle The Answer Run down towards them.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.
